title: parapolystichum hornei
intro: Parapolystichum hornei, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Parapolystichum hornei include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
